question: What is lead time?
options: (A) The average time for placing an order
(B) The average time for accepting an order
(C) The average time for placing an order and receiving the item
(D) The time taken for scrutinizing the order
correct_answer: (C) The average time for placing an order and receiving the item

question: Buffer stock items means :
options: (A) The quantity of items which are expired
(B) The quantity of items is not of standard
(C) The quantity of items kept for unfrozen demands
(D) The quantity of items which are not useable
correct_answer: (C) The quantity of items kept for unfrozen demands

question: Re-order level means :
options: (A) The level at which new order to be placed
(B) The level at which cancellation of order
(C) The level at which recall of order
(D) The level at which there is zero order
correct_answer: (A) The level at which new order to be placed

question: The carrying cost includes the following except :
